AI News & Updates

Stay updated with the latest AI trends, product updates, and industry insights from FuseAI Tools.

Video

Seedance Development History: From 1.0 Lite to 2.0 and ByteDance’s AI Video Roadmap

The development history of Seedance—ByteDance’s Seed team AI video model from 1.0 Lite and Pro through 1.5 Pro and 2.0—and how it became a leading text-to-video and image-to-video platform for Doubao, Volcano Engine, and creatives worldwide.

Image

Seedream Development History: ByteDance’s Path From Lite to 5.0 and Multimodal Image AI

The development history of Seedream—ByteDance’s Seed team image models from early Lite variants through Seedream 3.0, 4.0, and 5.0 Lite—and how they became a leading choice for text-to-image and image-to-image generation.

Video

Runway Development History: From Research Lab to Gen-3 Alpha and AI Video

The complete development history of Runway—from its 2018 founding and Stable Diffusion to Gen-1, Gen-2, and Gen-3 Alpha—and how it became a leading AI video generation platform.

Image

Midjourney Development History: From V1 to V7 and the Rise of AI Art

The complete development history of Midjourney, from its 2022 beta to V7—tracing how the AI image generator became a defining tool for digital artists and creatives worldwide.

Audio

ElevenLabs Development History: From Voice AI Beta to Multilingual v2, Turbo, and Beyond

The rise of ElevenLabs: from 2022 founding and public beta through Eleven Multilingual v2, Turbo v2.5, voice cloning, sound effects, speech-to-text, and the expansion into music and conversational agents.

Image

Nano Banana Development History: From LMArena Codename to Google Gemini Image Model

The story of Nano Banana: Google's Gemini image model from its LMArena discovery and banana emoji reveal through official release as Gemini 2.5 Flash Image, Nano Banana Pro, and beyond—character consistency, text rendering, and image editing.

Audio

Suno AI Development History: From Text-to-Music to v4.5 and Beyond

The rise of Suno AI: from public launch and Microsoft Copilot integration through v3, v4, v4.5, and v5—text-to-music, extend, custom vocals, and industry partnerships.

Image

FLUX.1 Kontext Development History: From Black Forest Labs to In-Context Image Editing

The evolution of FLUX.1 Kontext: Black Forest Labs' flow-matching models for in-context image generation and editing, from May 2025 release through the open-weight [dev] model and KontextBench.

Chat

The Evolution of DeepSeek: From DeepSeek-Coder to R1 and V3 — A History of China's Open-Source AI

A concise history of DeepSeek: from DeepSeek-Coder and DeepSeek-LLM in 2023 through MoE, V2, R1, and V3, covering open-source releases, reasoning models, and global impact.

Image

The Evolution of GPT-4o Image: From DALL-E to Native 4o Image Generation — OpenAI's AI Image History

A concise history of OpenAI's image generation: from DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 to GPT-4o native image generation in 2025, GPT Image API, and the shift from diffusion to autoregressive models.
